children.heading: Study on condition of currently existing facilities; submission of report; contents
children.label: a Study on condition of currently existing facilities; submission of report; contents

children.text: on which structurally sound buildings suitable for use as educational facilities are located, and

which is available for use by tribally controlled colleges or universities under and under the Act of (; ).section 523 of title 4070 Stat. 105725 U.S.C. 443a1August 6, 1956See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Renovation program
children.label: b Renovation program
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Bureau of Indian Affairs, shall initiate a program to conduct necessary renovations, alterations, repairs, and reconstruction identified pursuant to subsection (a) of this section.

children.heading: Determination and prioritization of construction and renovation needs
children.label: c Determination and prioritization of construction and renovation needs

children.text: The Secretary shall enter into a contract with an organization described in paragraph (2) to establish and provide on an annual basis criteria for the determination and prioritization in a consistent and equitable manner of the facilities construction and renovation needs of colleges or universities that receive funding under this chapter or the Navajo Community College Act.

children.label: A
children.text: is eligible to receive a contract under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act [ et seq.]; and25 U.S.C. 5301

children.label: B
children.text: has demonstrated expertise in areas and issues dealing with tribally controlled colleges or universities.
The Secretary shall include the priority list established pursuant to this subsection in the budget submitted annually to the Congress.

children.heading: “Reconstruction” defined
children.label: d “Reconstruction” defined
children.text: For the purposes of this section, the term “reconstruction” has the meaning provided in the first sentence of subparagraph (B) of section 1132e–1(2) of title 20.1
